---
title: "Pre-Research Questions"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r, load packages and load up working directory}

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(Rmisc)
library(rstatix)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(stringr)
#install.packages("readxl")
library(readxl)
#install.packages("lubridate")
#install.packages("lmerTest")
library(lmerTest)
#install.packages("ggeffects")
library(ggeffects)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:/Users/savan/OneDrive - San Francisco State University/ProjectData/GitHub/DepositionSFB/data')
```

```{r}

#write_xlsx(combined, "C:/Users/savan/OneDrive/Desktop/stats/combined.xlsx")

```

```{r}

#combined <-read_excel("C:/Users/savan/OneDrive/Desktop/stats/combined.xlsx")


usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Dist = as.character(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Dist)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Date.placed.in.field = as.Date(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Date.placed.in.field)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Date.removed.from.field = as.Date(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Date.removed.from.field)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Study.Phase <- as.factor(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Study.Phase)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Site <- as.factor(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Site)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Tran <- as.factor(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Tran)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Dist <- as.factor(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Dist)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Replicate<- as.factor(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Replicate)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Season<- as.factor(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Season)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Month<- as.factor(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Month)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Year<- as.factor(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Year)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$marsh_edge_type<- as.factor(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$marsh_edge_type)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$marsh_orientation<- as.factor(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$marsh_orientation)
usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Study.Dataset<- as.factor(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150$Study.Dataset)
str(usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150) 

```

```{r}

# dropped the USGS level from the Study.Dataset column, to focus on the thesis data
thesis_df = usgs_thesis_M1_m6_no150 %>% 
  filter(!Study.Dataset %in% c("USGS"))


# Dropped temporal variables as they are represented already within the Study.Phase variable
thesis_df <- thesis_df %>% 
  select(-Date.placed.in.field, -Date.removed.from.field)

thesis_df <- thesis_df %>%
  select(-Month, -Year, -Season, -Study.Dataset, -marsh_edge_type, -marsh_orientation, -LOI)

str(thesis_df)

```

avgdist = aggregate(Flux \~ Dist + Site + Tran, data = thesis_df, FUN = mean)

avgdist

```{r, Transect summary}
avgdist = aggregate(Flux ~ Dist + Site + Tran, data = thesis_df, FUN = mean)
avgdist
```

```{r, testing for normality}

shapiro.test(avgdist$Flux)
shapiro.test(log(avgdist$Flux))

qqnorm(avgdist$Flux)

qqline(avgdist$Flux)

```

```{r, linear model}

distmodel = glmer(Flux~Dist+(1|Site)+(1|Tran), data = avgdist)
summary(distmodel)

logdistmodel <- lmer(log(Flux) ~ Dist + (1|Site) + (1|Tran), data = avgdist)
summary(logdistmodel)

```

```{r}
plot(logdistmodel)        # residuals vs fitted
qqnorm(resid(logdistmodel))
qqline(resid(logdistmodel))
```

```{r, take out the outliers}

# Find which rows are the outliers
outliers <- which(abs(scale(resid(logdistmodel))) > 2.5)

# Fit model without them
distmodel_no_outliers <- lmer(log(Flux) ~ Dist + (1|Site) + (1|Tran), 
                               data = avgdist[-outliers, ])

# Compare coefficients
summary(logdistmodel)
summary(distmodel_no_outliers)

```

```{r, plot avg dist}
avgdist$Dist <- factor(avgdist$Dist, levels = c(0.5, 2, 6, 12, 18, 24, 48))

ggplot(avgdist, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, colour = Site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance (m)",   # update units if needed
    y = "Average Flux (g/cm^3/6 months)",           # update units if needed
    colour = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r, this is the graph we used for ppt}

avgdist$Dist = as.factor(avgdist$Dist)

ggplot(avgdist, aes(x = Dist, y = log(Flux), colour = Site, shape = Site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance (m)",
    y = "Log of Average Flux (g/cm^3/6 months)",
    colour = "Site",
    shape = "Site"
  ) + 
  theme_classic(base_size = 16)
```

```{r}
#let's treat distance as numerical instead of categorical

avgdist$Dist = as.numeric(as.character(avgdist$Dist))


ggplot(avgdist, aes(x = Dist, y = log(Flux), colour = Site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance (m)",   # update units if needed
    y = "Log of Average Flux (g/cm^3/6 months)",           # update units if needed
    colour = "Site"
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.5, 2, 6, 12, 18, 24, 48)) +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r}

ggplot(avgdist, aes(x = log(Dist), y = log(Flux), colour = Site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance (m)",   # update units if needed
    y = "Log of Average Flux (g/cm^3/6 months)",           # update units if needed
    colour = "Site"
  ) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.5, 2, 6, 12, 18, 24, 48)) +
  theme_classic()
```

```{r}
library(lmerTest)
distmodelcont <- lmer(log(Flux) ~ Dist + (1|Site) + (1|Tran), data = avgdist)
summary(distmodelcont)
```

```{r}

distsitemodel = lmer(log(Flux)~Dist+Site+Dist*Site+(1|Tran), data=avgdist)
summary(distsitemodel)
```

```{r}

# Generate predictions manually on the log scale
avgdist$predicted <- predict(distsitemodel)

# Get CIs manually
preds <- ggpredict(distsitemodel, terms = c("Dist [all]", "Site"), 
                   back.transform = FALSE)

# Plot
ggplot() +
  # Raw data points
  geom_point(data = avgdist, 
             aes(x = Dist, y = log(Flux), colour = Site, shape = Site),
             size = 3, alpha = 0.5) +
  # Model fit lines
  geom_line(data = preds, 
            aes(x = x, y = predicted, colour = group),
            linewidth = 1) +
  # Confidence intervals
  geom_ribbon(data = preds, 
              aes(x = x, ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high, fill = group),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.5, 2, 6, 12, 18, 24, 48)) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance (m)",
    y = "Log of Average Flux (g/cm^3)",
    colour = "Site",
    fill = "Site",
    shape = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16)

```

```         
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

# Create a prediction grid
pred_grid <- expand.grid(
  Dist = c(0.5, 2, 6, 12, 18, 24, 48),
  Site = unique(avgdist$Site),
  Tran = NA
)

# Get predictions on log scale with CIs
preds_manual <- predict(distsitemodel, newdata = pred_grid, 
                        re.form = ~0,  # fixes random effects to 0 (population level)
                        se.fit = TRUE)

pred_grid$predicted <- preds_manual$fit
pred_grid$lower <- preds_manual$fit - 1.96 * preds_manual$se.fit
pred_grid$upper <- preds_manual$fit + 1.96 * preds_manual$se.fit

# Plot
ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = avgdist,
             aes(x = Dist, y = log(Flux), colour = Site, shape = Site),
             size = 3, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(data = pred_grid,
            aes(x = Dist, y = predicted, colour = Site),
            linewidth = 1) +
  geom_ribbon(data = pred_grid,
              aes(x = Dist, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = Site),
              alpha = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.5, 2, 6, 12, 18, 24, 48)) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance (m)",
    y = "Log of Average Flux (g/cm^3)",
    colour = "Site",
    fill = "Site",
    shape = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 15))
```

```{r}



```

```{r}

transite = lmer(log(Flux) ~ Tran+Site+Tran*Site + (1|Dist), data = avgdist)


```

```{r}
#plot tran and site against each other 

library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)  # for geom_sina

ggplot(avgdist, aes(x = as.factor(Tran), y = log(Flux), fill = Site, colour = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +  # hide default outlier points
  geom_sina(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +               # raw points in sina layout
  labs(
    x = "Transect",
    y = "Log of Average Flux (g/cm^3/6 months)",
    fill = "Site",
    colour = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 18))
```

transite = lmer(log(Flux) \~ Tran+Site+Tran\*Site + (1\|Dist), data = avgdist)

```{r}

# Check what's still problematic
sum(thesis_df_clean$Flux <= 0, na.rm = TRUE)  # any remaining zeros/negatives
sum(is.na(thesis_df_clean$Flux))               # any NAs
sum(is.infinite(log(thesis_df_clean$Flux)))    # any Inf after log
sum(is.nan(log(thesis_df_clean$Flux)))         # any NaN after log

# Remove NAs, negatives, zeros and any Inf/NaN after log transformation
thesis_df_clean <- thesis_df[thesis_df$Flux > 0 & 
                              !is.na(thesis_df$Flux) &
                              is.finite(log(thesis_df$Flux)), ]

# Verify it's clean
sum(is.na(thesis_df_clean$Flux))
sum(thesis_df_clean$Flux <= 0)
nrow(thesis_df_clean)

thesis_df_clean$Tran <- as.factor(thesis_df_clean$Tran)
thesis_df_clean$Site <- as.factor(thesis_df_clean$Site)
thesis_df_clean$Replicate <- as.factor(thesis_df_clean$Replicate)
thesis_df_clean$Study.Phase <- as.factor(thesis_df_clean$Study.Phase)

transite1 <- lmer(log(Flux) ~ Tran + Site + Tran*Site + 
                  (1|Dist) + (1|Replicate) + (1|Study.Phase), 
                  data = thesis_df_clean)
summary(transite1)


```

```{r}
ggplot(thesis_df_clean, aes(x = as.factor(Tran), y = log(Flux), fill = Site, colour = Site)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_sina(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, scales = "free_x") +  # separate panel per site
  labs(
    x = "Transect",
    y = "Log of Average Flux (g/cm^3/month)",
    fill = "Site",
    colour = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 18)) + 
   theme(axis.text.y = element_text( hjust = 1, size = 12))
```

```{r, site per month}

ggplot(thesis_df_clean, aes(x = as.factor(Study.Phase), y = log(Flux), color = Site)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +  # hide default outlier points
  geom_sina(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +               # raw points in sina layout
  labs(
    x = "Month of Study",
    y = "Log of Average Flux (g/cm^3/month)",
    fill = "Site",
    colour = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 18))
```

```{r}

ggplot(thesis_df_clean, aes(x = Dist, y = log(Flux), color = Site)) + facet_wrap("Study.Phase") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, outlier.shape = NA) +  # hide default outlier points
  geom_sina(alpha = 0.6, size = 2) +               # raw points in sina layout
  labs(
    x = "Month of Study",
    y = "Log of Average Flux (g/cm^3/month)",
    fill = "Site",
    colour = "Site"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 18))
```

```{r}
#str(thesis_df_clean)

#for some reason, to switch to numeric from factor; have to FIRST switch to character then to numeric
thesis_df_clean$Dist = as.character(thesis_df_clean$Dist)
thesis_df_clean$Dist = as.numeric(thesis_df_clean$Dist)
```
